title: Re-educate and inform the (young) public about farming - "Fro de Bauer" (ask the farmer)
description: A guide to re-educate and inform young audiences about modern agricultural processes through school visits, campaigns, and interactive activities under the "Fro de Bauer" project. It outlines the methodology, curriculum integration, outreach materials, and project management structure funded by the EU Horizon 2020 program.
